text.title: Stakeholder Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Project crosses >=3 functional silos OR has exec sponsors?

conclusion.verdict: single-team or pre-PMF; use lighter RACI

branch.question: Register <=90 days AND no org change?

conclusion.verdict: author full register with cadence + rights + escalation
